entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary crop studied for yield response to climate and nitrogen inputs in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study is focused, encompassing various environmental zones

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The environmental phenomenon causing shifts in temperature, rainfall, and CO2 levels

entities.name: MAIZE YIELD
entities.description: The primary productivity measure used to assess the impact of climate and nitrogen

entities.name: CROP MODELS
entities.description: Computational tools used to simulate and quantify maize yield responses and uncertainty

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: Atmospheric gas whose concentration affects maize growth and response to other factors

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor affecting maize yield and growth

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental factor affecting maize yield and nitrogen leaching

entities.name: NITROGEN INPUT
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen fertilizer applied to the crop, ranging from 0 to 160 kg N/ha

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: A country in SSA with cool subhumid environments used in the study

entities.name: RWANDA
entities.description: A country in SSA with cool semi-arid environments used in the study

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: A country in SSA with hot subhumid environments used in the study

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country in SSA with hot semi-arid environments used in the study

entities.name: BENIN
entities.description: A country in SSA with hot semi-arid environments used in the study

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A specific measure of maize productivity used for model calibration

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS
entities.description: Total organic matter of the plant used for model calibration

entities.name: PLANT NITROGEN
entities.description: Nitrogen content within the plant used for model calibration

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: Measure of leaf area per unit ground area used for model calibration

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: Ratio of grain yield to total biomass used for model calibration

entities.name: SOIL WATER CONTENT
entities.description: Amount of water in the soil during the season used for model calibration

entities.name: NITROGEN LEACHING
entities.description: The loss of nitrogen from the soil through drainage, critical in low-input systems

entities.name: SOIL NITROGEN SUPPLY
entities.description: The availability of nitrogen in the soil for plant uptake

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of balancing nutrient inputs to intensify maize production
